The date commemorates the Roswell incident, when an unidentified object crashed near Roswell in July 1947. The event became one of the most famous UFO-related incidents in history.

World UFO Day is observed every year on 2 July to promote interest in unidentified flying objects (UFOs), now more commonly referred to as UAPs (Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena). https://t.co/uD8xWT2
